description.ko: 투명한 매질을 통과할 때 빛이 굴절되고 분산되는 방식을 탐구하며, 단일 광선 속에 숨겨진 다채로운 색채를 드러냅니다.
description.en: An exploration of how light bends and separates when passing through transparent mediums, revealing the hidden colors within a single beam.

prompt: Macro photograph of a triangular glass prism refracting a single beam of pure white light into a vivid, sharp rainbow spectrum. Chromatic aberration, caustic light patterns on a soft grey minimalist surface, high resolution, cinematic lighting, 8k.
